nodes.label: AI resource consumption
nodes.grounding_span: AI has assisted me in the past to locate resources quickly for clients

nodes.label: AI as meeting note-taking tool
nodes.label_negative: AI writing replacing original authentic notes
nodes.grounding_span: I do enjoy writing the basis for all of my logs independently of AI

nodes.label: AI as tool requiring human oversight
nodes.label_negative: AI as autonomous decision-maker without human input
nodes.grounding_span: I will usually collaborate with it throughout the task

nodes.label: AI as tool for critical thinking about AI
nodes.label_negative: AI overuse leading to skill atrophy
nodes.grounding_span: I think AI should be used in conjunction with with these skills, and not just relied on exclusively

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: without needing to scan and search for google search results, which can be time consuming

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal integrity
nodes.grounding_span: I want my original interaction to hold true when I log notes

nodes.label: Skill preservation and professional adaptability
nodes.grounding_span: I would lose out on honing these skills, and transferable abilities

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for resource creation
nodes.grounding_span: they were very pleased with the assistance

nodes.label: Anxiety about losing autonomy and control
nodes.grounding_span: I am a bit anxious to just let AI do all of the thinking for me

nodes.label: Intent to maintain balanced AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I think balance is the key to everything, and using AI should be no different

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — works back and forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I will read over its output briefly, and make adjustments as I go

nodes.label: Deliberate boundary-setting to preserve core skills
nodes.grounding_span: I do find many people letting AI do everything for them, which I try my best to avoid
